name: Olive Garden Tiramisu Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1 ½ lb Cream cheese or mascarpone (room temperature)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the sponge cake across the middle, forming two layers, each about 1 ½ inches high.
2. Mix coffee and brandy together.
3. Sprinkle enough of the coffee-brandy mixture over the bottom half of the cake to flavor it strongly. Avoid moistening the cake too much, as this may cause it to collapse when served.
4. Beat the room-temperature cream cheese and 1 cup powdered sugar until completely dissolved and light and spreadable. Taste during beating and add more sugar if needed.
5. Spread half of the cheese mixture over the cut surface of the bottom layer.
6. Replace the second layer on top and spread the remaining cheese mixture over it.
7. Sprinkle the top generously with sifted cocoa powder.
8. Refrigerate the cake for at least 2 hours before cutting and serving.
